name: life-vision-board
description: A platform-neutral Agent Pack for helping people clarify vague visions, manage a multi-goal growth portfolio, locate their current position, define milestones, execute the next stage, and review progress.

agentPlatformPlugin.description: Package Life Vision Board OS into third-party agent platforms.

standaloneProduct.description: Use the same OS inside a persistent Web/App Life Portfolio Dashboard.

dataArchitecture.sourcePackage: Reusable protocols, schemas, skills, tests, and docs live in this repository.
dataArchitecture.privateUserData: Private growth data should live outside source control or under a gitignored data/users/<user-id>/ workspace.
